projects.title: Fitz.ai
projects.description: AI-based fashion assistant that analyses skin tone and body structure to suggest suitable outfits. Aggregates insights from multiple e-commerce sources to deliver personalised recommendations.

projects.title: BeatsWeb Player
projects.description: Web music player built to explore frontend systems and API integration. Uses Spotify API for dynamic music control within a responsive UI.

projects.title: Air Draw
projects.description: Computer vision-based system that enables mid-air drawing using finger tracking. Includes neon stroke rendering, gesture controls, and FPS tracking for smooth interaction.

projects.title: Study Timer
projects.description: Productivity tool implementing the Pomodoro technique to track focused sessions and improve time management.

projects.title: Snake Game
projects.description: Classic snake game built purely with Python standard libraries, focusing on game logic, controls, and rendering.

projects.title: Tic Tac Toe
projects.description: Interactive browser-based game with clean game state handling, written using vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.title: Underwater Debris Detection
projects.description: Ongoing — Underwater trash and debris detection pipeline using deep learning for environmental monitoring.

education.degree: Integrated B.Tech — Artificial Intelligence & Deep Learning

experience.description: Worked on applied AI/ML research and experimentation within the institute's research division. Contributed to model development, data pipelines, and experiment documentation.
